message: Warming audit: fixed 5 grouped issues (#98-#102) вАФ scheduling/ban-risk, board indicators, cycle resilience, localization, channel feedback вАФ plus 6 review-found bugs (reconcile aborting quarantine recovery, cap=1 lockout, trust-ceiling progress, one-sided faded-pair DMs, case-sensitive invite dedup, stale doc). 536 tests green, coverage>=90%.

PR #104 accounts QA audit: fixed 15 findings. H2/M1 вАФ single-source RU localization (service emits raw AccountStatus + RU relative time; UI _account_status_label is the only translation point; deleted English _status_label). H1 вАФ UI sends username=None when unchanged (no USERNAME_NOT_MODIFIED). H3 вАФ error snapshots no longer cached. M2 footer hides only on success; M3 story kind inferred from extension (dropdown removed); M4 delete errors translated; M5 search debounce; M6 uploader CSS scoped to .tb-profile-dialog. All gates green, +6 tests (543 pass).

–§1 neurocomment (#114-#119) —Б–Љ—С—А–ґ–µ–љ –≤ main: 6 —Б—В–µ–Ї-PR #122->#127, squash —Б–љ–Є–Ј—Г –≤–≤–µ—А—Е, –Ї–∞–ґ–і—Л–є CI-–Ј–µ–ї—С–љ—Л–є (lint/ty/pytest-strict/aislop/semgrep/pip-audit). #124<->#126 is_forward add/add (squash —Б—В—С—А –Њ–±—Й—Г—О #116-–Є—Б—В–Њ—А–Є—О) —А–∞–Ј—А–µ—И—С–љ —В—А–Є–≤–Є–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ вАФ –ї–Є—Б—В–µ–љ–µ—А/—Б—Е–µ–Љ–∞/—В–µ—Б—В byte-identical –Ї —Б–Љ—С—А–ґ–µ–љ–љ–Њ–Љ—Г –ї–Є—Б—В–µ–љ–µ—А—Г, –њ–Њ—Н—В–Њ–Љ—Г #126 –ї—С–≥ –Ї–∞–Ї verified engine-only diff. –Ц–Є–≤–∞—П –Ї–∞–љ–∞—А–µ–є–Ї–∞ (#119) –Є —А–µ—И–µ–љ–Є–µ –Ї–∞–њ—З–Є (#120) –Њ—Б—В–∞–≤–ї–µ–љ—Л –Њ–њ–µ—А–∞—В–Њ—А—Г (HITL), –љ–µ –Ј–∞–њ—Г—Б–Ї–∞–ї–Є—Б—М.

neurocomment –§2 #136: un-assign —А–µ–∞–ї–Є–Ј–Њ–≤–∞–љ repo-direct (remove_account_from_campaign вАФ hard DELETE m2m, scoped –њ–Њ –њ–∞—А–µ, no cascade —В.–Ї. readiness —И–∞—А–Є—В—Б—П –Љ–µ–ґ–і—Г –Ї–∞–Љ–њ–∞–љ–Є—П–Љ–Є), –С–Х–Ч —Б–µ—А–≤–Є—Б–∞: —В–Њ–љ–Ї–Є–є campaign-CRUD –Є–і—С—В —З–µ—А–µ–Ј core.db –љ–∞–њ—А—П–Љ—Г—О –Ї–∞–Ї assign/link/deactivate; pass-through-—Б–µ—А–≤–Є—Б –±—Л–ї –±—Л shallow-–Љ–Њ–і—Г–ї–µ–Љ (grill-—А–µ—И–µ–љ–Є–µ, –Њ–њ–µ—А–∞—В–Њ—А –і–µ–ї–µ–≥–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–ї –≤—Л–±–Њ—А).

neurocomment –§2 #136 (branch claude/peaceful-bhabha-e08f72, –Э–Х –≤ main –њ–Њ –њ—А–Њ—Б—М–±–µ –Њ–њ–µ—А–∞—В–Њ—А–∞): un-assign –∞–Ї–Ї–∞—Г–љ—В–∞ + –Љ—Г–ї—М—В–Є–Ї–∞–Љ–њ–∞–љ–Є–є–љ—Л–є ui.select-–њ–µ—А–µ–Ї–ї—О—З–∞—В–µ–ї—М. test-first (grillвЖТtdd). 796 —В–µ—Б—В–Њ–≤ –Ј–µ–ї—С–љ—Л–µ, ruff/ty/aislop/format —З–Є—Б—В–Њ, branch-cov >=90%. –Я–Њ—Б—В-—А–µ–≤—М—О 3 —Б—Г–±–∞–≥–µ–љ—В–∞–Љ–Є: –±–µ–Ј blocker/major; —Г–±—А–∞–љ—Л 2 –Љ–Є–љ–Њ—А–љ—Л–µ –Є–Ј–±—Л—В–Њ—З–љ–Њ—Б—В–Є (per-switch on_disconnect accumulation, redundant listener-null guard).

neurocomment #136 –њ–Њ—Б—В /code-review (max-effort): 2 –≥—А–Њ–Љ–Ї–Є–µ –љ–∞—Е–Њ–і–Ї–Є –Њ–њ—А–Њ–≤–µ—А–≥–љ—Г—В—Л source-verify NiceGUI 3.13 (set_options —Б–∞–Љ —З–Є—Б—В–Є—В stale-value вЖТ listener-guard –ї–Є—И–љ–Є–є; section.refresh –њ—А–Њ–±—А–Њ—Б–Є–ї –±—Л event вЖТ on_switch wrapper –љ—Г–ґ–µ–љ). –Ш—Б–њ—А–∞–≤–ї–µ–љ—Л 2 –Љ–Є–љ–Њ—А–љ—Л—Е (–і–µ—Д–Њ–ї—В –њ–µ—А–µ–Ї–ї—О—З–∞—В–µ–ї—П -> campaigns[-1]; –≤–Њ—Б—Б—В–∞–љ–Њ–≤–ї–µ–љ on_disconnect-teardown —В–∞–є–Љ–µ—А–∞ = –Ї–Њ–љ–≤–µ–љ—Ж–Є—П —А–µ–њ–Њ). 1 major altitude: per-campaign Start/Stop –њ–Њ–≤–µ—А—Е fleet-global —Б–ї—Г—И–∞—В–µ–ї—П -> caption-mitigation + follow-up #137 (–≤—Л–љ–Њ—Б –Ї–Њ–љ—В—А–Њ–ї–Њ–≤ –љ–∞ —Г—А–Њ–≤–µ–љ—М —Д–ї–Њ—В–∞). 796 —В–µ—Б—В–Њ–≤ –Ј–µ–ї—С–љ—Л–µ.

neurocomment #137 (altitude –Є–Ј –Ї–Њ–і-—А–µ–≤—М—О): per-campaign Start/Stop –њ–Њ–≤–µ—А—Е fleet-global —Б–ї—Г—И–∞—В–µ–ї—П -> –≤—Л–љ–µ—Б listener+–Ч–∞–њ—Г—Б—В–Є—В—М/–Ю—Б—В–∞–љ–Њ–≤–Є—В—М –≤ –µ–і–Є–љ—Л–є _render_runtime_controls (—А–µ–љ–і–µ—А –Њ–і–Є–љ —А–∞–Ј, listener –Є–Ј –≤—Б–µ—Е –∞–Ї–Ї–∞—Г–љ—В–Њ–≤); per-campaign —Б–µ–Ї—Ж–Є—П = –Ї–∞–љ–∞–ї—Л+–∞–Ї–Ї–∞—Г–љ—В—Л+–Њ–љ–±–Њ—А–і–Є–љ–≥; on_toggle —Г–њ—А–Њ—Й—С–љ (—Г–±—А–∞–љ–∞ listener-sync —Б–≤—П–Ј–Ї–∞). –†–µ–∞–ї–Є–Ј–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Њ –≤ –≤–µ—В–Ї–µ (–Ї–Њ–Љ–Љ–Є—В 048c49a), Closes #137.

Make-it-real epic (design to backend) merged to main via PR #190 (squash 4088748): proxy pool, trust/device/spam, edit-card checks, phone-code login + logout/reset, warming card log, neuro feed/captcha/board, neuro settings wired into the engine, profile edit + photo upload, proxy-delete confirm + account-delete FK fix. CI 7/7 green. Remaining de-mock items (warmed list, pool assign from card, story/music posting, neuro comment text, manual captcha) tracked for a follow-up /goal session.

feat/finish-design-backend (#191): removed all remaining frontend mocks вАФ warming graduation (promote/unpromote + warmed list), ready-card proxy/flag/trust, AccountEdit proxy assign, +Account wizard import+assign, .session/tdata dropzone, profile media (photos/stories/music via base64 view), NC comment text, captcha solver toggle->solver_enabled + –Я—А–Њ–є—В–Є->retry, delete-campaign/channel-x/edit-prompt, account-delete. No new migration. 852 backend + 111 FE tests; 6/7 CI green; semgrep red = pre-existing infra drift (separate task).

2026-07-10 audit session. ponytail-audit found the repo lean (no dead code/deps/debt). Targeted complexity refactor merged (#207): AccountEdit 1274->~85 and NeurocommentPage 1408->~570 split into co-located ui/ siblings; warming start_warming C17->A, _run_chat_step C12->B, _read_and_react 5-tuple->dataclass. Item 3 (telegram dispatchers) dropped as net-negative churn. Then a parallel bug audit + fixes merged (#209): 4 MED (warming target-gate skips quarantine/flood_wait, neurocomment in-flight dedup read live, set_account_photo 400 not 500, decode_session_claims rejects empty AUTH__SECRET) + 2 LOW hardening (tdata-zip streams+counts real bytes vs declared, phone_geo loguru %s->{}). 1071 tests green, CI 7/7. Deferred: daily-cap ~2x on mid-cycle restart -> issue #208; six other low findings judged not-worth-fixing.

2026-07-11 operator-reported warming-card UI session (PR #212). The step rail was decorative (cycles_completed % 6) and could show a fake Ђ‘ормирование отчЄтаї live step with no timer. Made the rail reflect the real engine cycle: activeStage maps persisted last_action (set_online/join->subscribe, read, react->reactions, stories, send_dm->stories fold), waiting states (sleeping/flood_wait/quarantine)->pause+countdown, idle->start. Reordered STAGES to emission order (subscribe,read,reactions,stories,pause) because the rail renders by index and stories runs after reactions; dropped the fake report step + its ru/en i18n labels. Backend now emits a real stories progress step: maybe_watch_stories returns whether a view landed, run_one_cycle advances via _watch_stories_step only when it did, stories added to _loop._PROGRESS_STEPS between react and send_dm. Grill caught the original premise error (current_phase is the multi-day lifecycle, not the in-cycle step). +2 backend / +6 vitest; 1081 pytest + 211 vitest + ruff/ty/tsc/eslint/steiger green. Sonnet 5 review clean over both increments. Not merged (operator call).
